description:
In the SciNote 'PCR Reagents' inventory, enable low-stock tracking by adding a 'Minimum Stock' column of type Number. Update the 'Minimum Stock' values for 'Taq DNA Polymerase' to 200 and 'dNTP Mix 10mM' to 400. Ensure all changes are saved and visible in the inventory table.
